Motion To Compel Attendance At Arbitration Hearing And For Continuance
Off Calendar Feb-27-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Michael Casey Walker, Esq., appearing for plaintiff and moving party. James Mahon, Esq., appearing for defendant.
Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Attendance at Arbitration Hearing and for Continuance is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel court ordered motion denied. Court ordered the Arbitrator's jurisdiction extended to 5/30/2003. The Arbitration OSC is re-set to 6/19/03 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
